title: Panda Temple
description: Spawns a mysterious overgrown temple in the jungle inhabited by our favorite bamboo eating creature!
body:
# Welcome to Panda Temple!

## Introduction
Pandas in Minecraft are extremely rare, but have you ever wondered why that is? Maybe this structure will shine a light on a forgotten civilization that would do anything to care for their favorite animals. It looks like a lovely place, or is there more to it than meets the eye?


## Features
This datapack adds the Panda Temple which spawns in the Jungle biome. It houses pandas, parrots, frogs, and ocelots. While you can just get the animals, you can also explore further to try and find valuable stuff that is protected in a way that you want to be in the end game with enchanted gear and tools to stand a chance (or find a creative way to obtain it). 

<details>
<summary>/locate command</summary>

/locate structure pandatemple:pandatemple

</details>

If you have a cool idea to make this datapack better, please make a suggestion in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/YPgxKKb2Mr)!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0qJSbtP/images/ee8fef9a1614c18075ac0e9397efc6b3e25df4e9.png)



<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Shoutout to @Navelpluus who designed the temple!

</details>
